activated_rules.rule_name: Letter of Credit exception not active
General goods description with invoice reference

consignor.certificate_value: Vitrolife Sweden AB, Box 9080, 42132, Göteborg Sweden
consignor.invoice_value: Vitrolife Sweden AB, Box 9080, 400 92 Göteborg, SWEDEN
consignor.motivation: Consignor "Vitrolife Sweden AB" as in certificate is found explicitly as invoice issuer named 'Vitrolife Sweden AB' with matching company name and Swedish origin after allowed normalization (rules 4.1.0, 4.1.3.6, 4.1.4). Minor difference in postal code and addressing allowed.

consignee.certificate_value: SISMEDIKAL San. Tic. Ltd. Sti., Cumhuriyet Cad. No: 131/2 Üsküdar, Mr. Engin Gedik, 34725 Istanbul, Türkiye
consignee.invoice_value: SISMEDIKAL San. Tic. Ltd. Sti., Cumhuriyet Cad. No: 131/2 Üsküdar, TR-34725 Istanbul, Turkey
consignee.motivation: Consignee name and address "SISMEDIKAL San. Tic. Ltd. Sti." with matching address in Istanbul Turkey found explicitly in invoice Delivery address and Invoice address. The country normalization Türkiye vs Turkey performed (rule 4.6). Land matches.

goods_description.certificate_value: Components for Culturing Media for In Vitro Fertilisation(IVF)
goods_description.invoice_value: Multiple product lines under Description field including ASP™, SpermGrad™, SpermRinse™, G-MOPS™ PLUS, etc.
goods_description.motivation: Certificate states general goods description with explicit invoice reference 'See attached invoice 2510582 dated 20250805'. Invoice number and date match. According to rule 4.3.5, general goods description with invoice reference is acceptable and matches.

quantity.motivation: Gross weight 262.40 kg in certificate matches invoice gross weight 262.4 kg after normalization of decimals and thousand separators. Units match and weight category 'Gross' identified in certificate; invoice confirms with 'Gross weight (kg)'. Quantity 12 cartons also matched.

origin.motivation: Certificate origin 'European Community' normalized to European Union which matches invoice stated origin 'Sweden' as Sweden is an EU member at certificate issue date. Invoice explicitly states 'Country of Origin: Sweden' above product list.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: All applicable control points including consignor, consignee, goods description, quantity, and origin could be verified without contradictions or uncertainty. Conditions for automatic approval are met.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer överens mellan certifikatet och fakturan. Dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt.
